headline: How The Investment Narrative For Tyler Technologies (TYL) Is Shifting With New Street Targets
summary: Tyler Technologies has seen its modeled fair value price target adjusted slightly, moving from $443.48 to $438.71, a trim of about 1% that aligns with refreshed assumptions. Around this change, recent analyst research shows a mix of sizeable price target cuts and more constructive calls, reflecting different views on how much valuation room there is for execution risk. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets fit into the evolving narrative and what to watch as sentiment...
